Hai lớp bảo vệ cho giao diện hiện đại (/: Two defense layers for the modern (/v/) client: a keep-alive cap so the app doesn’t slow down over time, and a crash guard for broken relations.
NocoBase v2 giữ mọi trang đã mở trong bộ: NocoBase v2 keeps every opened page mounted and never evicts it — the DOM node count climbs unbounded as you navigate menus (3k → 21k) until a full reload. Enable this to auto-evict and keep the DOM lean.
Giữ N trang gần nhất còn sống để quay lạ: Keep the N most-recent pages alive for instant return; older pages are evicted. 0 = evict all background pages (max performance, but returning reloads the page).
Mẹo: mở Console gõ: Tip: open the Console and type
Một quan hệ hỏng (thiếu belongsTo ngược: A broken relation (missing reverse belongsTo / mismatched FK) can make a column throw during render and freeze the whole app. This layer isolates each column: a broken one becomes an empty cell instead of freezing everything.
